nodes.name: agents.md
nodes.summary: Catalog of available OMC agents (planner, architect, tdd-guide, code-reviewer, etc.) with purpose descriptions, trigger conditions, and parallel execution patterns.

nodes.name: code-review.md
nodes.summary: Code review standards defining mandatory review triggers, severity levels (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), review workflows, and integration points with testing, security, and git rules.

nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Core coding style principles including immutability, KISS/DRY/YAGNI, file organization, error handling, input validation, naming conventions, and anti-pattern avoidance.

nodes.name: development-workflow.md
nodes.summary: Full feature development pipeline extending git-workflow: research and reuse first, planning with planner agent, TDD, code review, commit, and pre-review checks.

nodes.name: git-workflow.md
nodes.summary: Foundational git workflow with conventional commit format, PR workflow, and a cross-reference to the full development-workflow pipeline.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Hooks system documentation covering PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop hook types, auto-accept permissions caution, and TodoWrite best practices.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Reusable pattern guidance: skeleton project adoption strategy and core design patterns including Repository pattern and consistent API response envelope.

nodes.name: performance.md
nodes.summary: Performance optimization rules with Haiku/Sonnet/Opus model selection, context window management, extended thinking control, and build troubleshooting workflow.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Security baseline: mandatory commit checks, secret management with environment variables, and incident response protocol requiring security-reviewer agent.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Testing requirements specifying 80% coverage minimum, mandatory TDD workflow, troubleshooting steps, agent support, and Arrange-Act-Assert test structure with TypeScript examples.
